meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: As of May 11, 2026 update, 78 of 80 required events reported; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout still guided for 2H 2026, no confirmation yet that 80th event has been reached. New: company filed a $154.6M shelf registration in July 2026 (dilution overhang, not an imminent raise).
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event; watch for any shelf takedown/offering

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 74.4% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold, worse than last run's 69.8%; trim ~36.55 shares to reach 35% NAV

catalyst.name: Staggered IPO lockup unlock + $25B bond overhang
catalyst.status: Stock now ~$116, down ~14% below the $135 IPO price and down 20.4% since the 2026-07-11 log entry. First insider lockup tranche (20%) unlocks 2nd trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected around Aug 6 2026 (~2 weeks out); bonus 10% unlock possible if stock trades 30%+ above IPO price pre-earnings (not currently on track). Longest-dated 2056 bond tranche now trading at junk-like spreads despite investment-grade rating and oversubscribed pricing - credit market repricing risk higher than the rating implies.
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date confirmation; stock action into the Aug lockup unlock; bond spread trend

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within 35% cap but position down sharply since last check; lockup-driven supply event ~2 weeks out with deteriorating credit tone

flags: SLS concentration WORSENED to 74.4% of NAV (vs 69.8% on 2026-07-11), now more than double the 35% trim threshold, still with no confirmed 80th-event catalyst; new $154.6M shelf filing adds a dilution overhang.

SPCX down 20.4% since the last log entry (2026-07-11), now trading ~14% below its IPO price, heading into its first lockup unlock (~Aug 6) with the long-dated 2056 bond trading at junk-like levels - credit tone has softened.
Zero USD cash buffer - account still fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
Account NAV (EUR base) down ~8.1% since the last log entry, driven by declines in both positions.
No news breaks either thesis outright, but neither position has a de-risking catalyst confirmed yet, and the SLS concentration has never been closer to breaching a full 2x of its own trim rule.
